subTitle: Popatlal feels happy to meet with Sweety, who might become his wife. Popatlal endeavours to impress her during their encounter.

subTitle: Daya calls Jethalal when he is at work to inform him about Popatlal, who goes to a hotel for searching a lady and later falls into trouble.

subTitle: Dr Hathi and his family decide to go for lunch at the new restaurant. However, their family time is interrupted when a tree falls on Dr Hathi.

subTitle: When Dr Hathi gets stuck beneath a tree, his brothers and the society members rush to the restaurant and try to help him.

subTitle: After everyone tries their best but fails, Babita comes up with a brilliant solution and shares it with the members.

subTitle: The police arrest Sodhi and his friends. Meanwhile, Daya and her neighbours ask Inspector Chalu Pandey to find their husbands.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Daya and her friends find their husbands at the police station. Meanwhile, the police interrogate Sodhi about the crime.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After getting released, Sodhi helps the police identify two car thieves. Jethalal and his friends enjoy their freedom.

title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
subTitle: The untold story of the divine brothers of the Shiv Parivaar: Lord Ganesh and Lord Kartikeya. They are a family bound by devotion, challenged by destiny and united by eternal love.

subTitle: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

subTitle: Anvita, a young caregiver, shoulders the burden of raising her five siblings. As she navigates her responsibilities and growing attachment to Virat, she's also supported by Sanjay, who harbours unrequited feelings for her.
